Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc

Class ElementDescRegistry

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc.ElementDescRegistry
All Implemented Interfaces:
IElementDescRegistry
public class ElementDescRegistry extends Object implements IElementDescRegistry
Registry for element descriptors contributed through the org.eventb.ui.editorItems extension point.

    • ElementDescRegistry

      private ElementDescRegistry()

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static ElementDescRegistry getInstance()

    • getElementDesc

      public ElementDesc getElementDesc(IElementType<?> type)
      Returns the descriptor for the given element type. This method never returns null. If there is no declared descriptor for the given element type, an instance of NullElementDesc is returned.
      Returns:
      the descriptor for the given element type

    • getElementDesc

      public ElementDesc getElementDesc(IInternalElementType<?> type)
      Description copied from interface: IElementDescRegistry
      Returns the UI description for the given internal element type.

      If no description was contributed for the given element type, a dummy description is returned. Users shall therefore check for the validity of the returned description using the API method IElementDesc.isValid().

      Specified by:
      getElementDesc in interface IElementDescRegistry
      Returns:
      the descriptor for the given internal element type, maybe invalid

    • getElementDesc

      public ElementDesc getElementDesc(IRodinElement element)
      Returns the descriptor for the given element (based on it element type). This method never returns null. If there is no declared descriptor for the given element, an instance of NullElementDesc is returned.
      Returns:
      the descriptor for the given element

    • getElementDescs

      public ElementDesc[] getElementDescs()
      Returns all valid registered element UI descriptions.
      Specified by:
      getElementDescs in interface IElementDescRegistry
      Returns:
      the array of valid element UI descriptions

      public String getValueAtColumn(IRodinElement element, ElementDescRegistry.Column column)
